name: Zarzuela
recipeIngredient: 1 pound fish fillet, cut into chunks
16 ounces Italian plum tomatoes, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the seafood separately until just cooked. Remove clams from shells (discarding any that do not open), peel and devein shrimp. Set seafood aside.
2. Heat oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Sauté onion and garlic until tender. Stir in rice and parsley, cooking until rice is golden brown.
3. Add tomatoes, clam juice, wine, and water to the saucepan. Bring to a boil, cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Mix seafood into the rice. Add cilantro and Tabasco. Cover and cook on low heat for an additional 10 minutes.
5. Check seasoning and salt and pepper to taste. Pour into a shallow serving dish, top with avocado slices, dollops of sour cream, and sprigs of cilantro. Serve with lime wedges.
